formula_notes: Fraction of captured images that are usable.
meaning: Fraction of captured images that are usable. Corrupted or unreadable images reduce effective coverage.

formula_notes: Fraction of images with any GPS coordinate in EXIF.
meaning: Fraction of images with any GPS coordinate in EXIF. Images without geotags cannot be used in photogrammetric reconstruction.

formula_notes: Boolean: images in raw uncompressed format.
meaning: Boolean: images are in raw uncompressed format. DNG/RAW retains full radiometric depth.

formula_expression: computed from EXIF GPS positions + image footprint geometry: footprint_width = (sensor_width_mm/focal_length_mm) * actual_altitude; overlap_fwd = 1 - (along_track_distance / footprint_height)
formula_notes: Forward overlap computed from actual EXIF positions, not from any flight log.
meaning: Forward overlap computed from actual image EXIF positions and footprint geometry. Independent of any GCS-computed metric.

formula_expression: same method as image_computed_overlap_fwd_pct, lateral (cross-track) direction
formula_notes: Lateral overlap computed from actual EXIF positions.
meaning: Lateral overlap computed from actual EXIF positions. Captures cases where flight lines drifted apart.

formula_notes: Boolean: camera manufacturer match.
meaning: Boolean: the camera manufacturer in EXIF matches the calibration file. Mismatches mean the calibration applies to different hardware.

formula_notes: Boolean: camera model match.
meaning: Boolean: the camera model in EXIF matches the calibration file.

formula_notes: survey_date taken from BIN CAM gnss_timestamp_utc (first CAM record).
meaning: Age of the camera calibration in months at time of survey. Calibration parameters drift with thermal cycling, vibration, lens handling.

formula_notes: Coefficient of variation — lower = more consistent exposure.
meaning: How stable camera exposure was throughout the flight session. High variance means radiometric inconsistency.

formula_notes: Ratio > 1.0 is ideal (recording started before takeoff and ended after landing).
meaning: Fraction of the flight that has RINEX coverage. Ratio > 1.0 is ideal. Below 1.0 means part of the flight has no rover observations.

formula_notes: Boolean threshold on dual frequency ratio.
meaning: Boolean: the RINEX file is predominantly dual-frequency. Enables ionospheric correction in PPK.

formula_notes: Direct rename of source boolean for indicator clarity.
meaning: Boolean: any gap in RINEX recording exceeds 60 seconds. A gap this long during a short drone flight effectively breaks PPK.

formula_expression: time from first RINEX epoch to first epoch where sat_count >= 4 AND cn0_mean >= 30
formula_notes: Iterate epochs in RINEX file; record time delta from obs_start_utc to first stable epoch.
meaning: How long the rover took to reach stable satellite tracking after recording began.

formula_expression: mean(PDOP values) computed from satellite geometry across all RINEX epochs within the flight window
formula_notes: PDOP must be computed from RINEX satellite positions (not directly stored). Flight window now derived from BIN ARM/DISARM.
meaning: Mean Position Dilution of Precision during the actual flight window. Low PDOP means good satellite geometry.

formula_notes: Same window as mean_pdop_during_flight.
meaning: Worst-case satellite geometry during the flight. A spike above 6.0 during the flight is much worse than the same value while parked.

formula_expression: convert(ARM_event_timestamp) using GPS.GWk + GPS.GMS at the GPS message closest to ARM
formula_notes: One-time conversion in BIN parser.
meaning: True UTC takeoff timestamp, derived from the BIN ARM event by cross-referencing the nearest GPS week + time-of-week. No external clock required.

formula_expression: convert(DISARM_event_timestamp) using GPS.GWk + GPS.GMS at the GPS message closest to DISARM
formula_notes: Same conversion at DISARM.
meaning: True UTC landing timestamp, derived from the BIN DISARM event.

formula_expression: count(MODE transitions into RTL or LAND while ARM_state is True)
formula_notes: From BIN MODE messages.
meaning: Number of mid-flight mode changes into RTL or LAND, used as a proxy for mission interruptions.

formula_notes: From BIN MODE messages.
meaning: Boolean: did the drone initiate a return-to-base mode during the flight.

formula_notes: Cross-file check between BIN CAM records and Images source.
meaning: Derived boolean: number of CAM shutter records in the BIN matches the number of image files on the SD card. Mismatch indicates a recording error.

formula_notes: Shoelace formula on convex hull or polygon of waypoints.
meaning: Survey area polygon area derived from BIN CMD waypoints. Replaces the former planned_area_m2 source field.

formula_notes: Camera params from calibration, altitude from BIN.
meaning: Target GSD derived from planned altitude and camera geometry. Replaces former source field.

formula_notes: Same formula using actual mean altitude from BIN CTUN.
meaning: Achieved GSD computed from actual mean altitude and camera geometry. Replaces former source field.

formula_notes: Footprint per image computed from altitude + sensor geometry; union polygon over all geotagged images.
meaning: Actual coverage percentage of planned area, computed from the union of geotagged image footprints. Replaces former source field.

formula_notes: Ratio near 1.0 = good altitude control.
meaning: How closely the achieved GSD matched the planned GSD. Ratio near 1.0 = good altitude control.

formula_notes: Uses computed actual overlap (L2D_IMG_004) divided by user-input planned overlap.
meaning: How closely achieved forward overlap matched planned overlap.

formula_notes: Same pattern as fwd.
meaning: How closely achieved lateral overlap matched planned overlap.
How closely mean actual altitude matched planned altitude.
Fraction of planned waypoints successfully visited.
Fraction of the planned survey area that was actually flown.

formula_notes: 12 m/s = typical maximum operational wind speed for survey drones.
meaning: Mean wind speed normalised against the operational limit.

formula_expression: std_dev(CTUN altitude values during cruise lines)
formula_notes: Excludes takeoff and landing phases.
meaning: How much the drone's altitude fluctuated during the survey lines.
